THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT GORODETSKY, OVSEY RECOVER FROM APPELLANT ULITSKY, VADIM P $5,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,290.00, DEFENDANT SHOWED THAT HE WAS NOT DRIVING UNDER THE MEDALLION FROM MAY 1, 2013, SO WAS ONLY RESPONSIBLE FOR 2 MONTHS RENT. CROSS CLAIM JUDGMENT IS AFFIRMED AND IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF OVSEY GORODETSKY AND AGAINST VADIM ULITSKY IN THE MOUNT OF $0.00. TOTAL JUDGMENT FOR CROSS CLAIM IS $0.00; SALE OF THE MEDALLION WAS NOT A BREACH OF THE PARTIES' ORAL AGREEMENT. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 3/26/2014. calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-01-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:03am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk Jean Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Vadim P. Ulitsky appears as pro per with witness Vladimir Traktine and interpreter/son Bogdan Ulitsky; respondent, Ovsey Gorodetsk appear with witness/interpreter/son Vladimir Gorodetsky. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHA (1) Taxi Medallion agreement/Affidavits from Valdimir German, Dmitriy Sverdlov, Leonid Etin, and Vladimir Traktine/SF Town Taxi Jacob Mayzel, manager's letter/list of rental amount.
EXHR (A) Taxi Medallion Sales form/Michael Harris letter

Direct examine witness Vladimir Traktine by Bogdan Ulitsky commence.

10:40
Matter is submitted. Newly marked evidence retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-26-2014 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-26-2014 Judgment Entered
